# Border Radius

You can easily customize the border radius used in ConnectKit to more closely match the look and feel of your app.

If you're looking to customize the connect button, check out **Custom Connect Button**.

## Example

To change the border radius, provide a `customTheme` prop to your `<ConnectKitProvider />`.

This example sets the border radius to **42px**:

```jsx
<ConnectKitProvider
  customTheme={{
    "--ck-border-radius": 42,
  }}
>
  {/* Your App */}
</ConnectKitProvider>
```

That's it—the custom theme now extends the default theme to support your custom border radius.

## Here it is in action

The live demo lets you switch the modal's border radius between `0px`, `8px`, `12px`, `16px`, `24px`, and `30px`. Below are two static snapshots showing the two extremes, followed by an animation of the transition.

**Border radius `0px` (square corners):**

![ConnectKit modal with 0px border radius — square corners](data:image/png;base64,)

**Border radius `30px` (fully rounded, pill-shaped buttons):**

![ConnectKit modal with 30px border radius — rounded corners](data:image/png;base64,)

**Animation** — cycling through the border-radius values (0 → 8 → 16 → 30 → 24px) shows the modal corners and buttons morphing smoothly. Recording included alongside this file:

![ConnectKit border radius demo animation](./connectkit-border-radius-demo.gif)
